title: CLI / MCP Tool Parity — Close the 16-Domain Gap
objective: Every CLI command that agents use must have an MCP tool equivalent so Claude Code (and any MCP client) can invoke them without shelling out. Close the 16 CLI-only domains identified in the parity audit.

phases.title: Tier 0 — High-Value Agent Operations
phases.description: MCP tools agents need most frequently during workplan execution and dev pipeline runs.
phases.rationale: These commands are called in every swarm session. Missing MCP coverage forces agents to shell out via hex_exec, losing structured output.

tasks.title: hex_dev_start / hex_dev_status — dev pipeline MCP tools
tasks.description: Expose dev pipeline start/status/stop as MCP tools. dev.rs already delegates to nexus REST; MCP tools wrap the same client calls with JSON schema.

tasks.title: hex_report — workplan/test/swarm report MCP tool
tasks.description: Reports are the primary way agents verify work completion. Structured JSON output is critical for validation judges.

tasks.title: hex_stdb_query / hex_stdb_tables — SpacetimeDB direct query
tasks.description: Direct STDB query from MCP. Also addresses ADR-2604021215 (proposed). Once implemented, that ADR can be accepted.

tasks.title: hex_doctor — diagnostic health check MCP tool
tasks.description: Agents need to self-diagnose when nexus/stdb/inference is unreachable. Doctor output is structured and maps directly to MCP JSON.

phases.gate: cargo check -p hex-cli && cargo test -p hex-cli

phases.title: Tier 1 — Context & Specification Tools
phases.description: Tools that provide architectural context and behavioral specs to agents.
phases.rationale: Context injection and spec verification are called at phase boundaries in the dev pipeline. Without MCP tools, agents lose structured access.

tasks.title: hex_context — architecture context MCP tool
tasks.description: Expose architecture context retrieval and injection for inference calls.

tasks.title: hex_spec — behavioral spec MCP tools
tasks.description: Specs drive validation judges. Agents need to read and validate specs without shelling out.

tasks.title: hex_readme — README generation MCP tool
tasks.description: README generation is part of the project output contract (ADR-055). MCP tool ensures agents can trigger it.

phases.gate: cargo check -p hex-cli && cargo test -p hex-cli

phases.title: Tier 2 — Infrastructure & Lifecycle Tools
phases.description: Tools for sandbox management, CI, init, and hook introspection.
phases.rationale: Less frequently called but needed for full autonomous operation — especially sandbox and init for project bootstrapping.

tasks.title: hex_sandbox — container sandbox MCP tools
tasks.description: Docker sandbox lifecycle. Small surface area — 133 lines maps cleanly to 3 tools.

tasks.title: hex_init — project initialization MCP tool
tasks.description: Initialize hex in a target project. Needed for agents bootstrapping new projects.

tasks.title: hex_ci — CI status MCP tool
tasks.description: CI check before commit/merge. Agents need to verify CI passes without leaving MCP.

tasks.title: hex_hook_list — hook introspection MCP tool
tasks.description: Read-only hook introspection. NOT exposing hook execution (that stays CLI-only for safety). 2436 lines but only the list/status surface needs MCP.

phases.gate: cargo check -p hex-cli && cargo test -p hex-cli

phases.title: Tier 3 — Chat, Skill, and Validate
phases.description: Lower-priority tools that complete full parity.

tasks.title: hex_chat — chat session MCP tool
tasks.description: Chat relay for inter-agent messaging via MCP.

tasks.title: hex_skill — skill listing MCP tool
tasks.description: List available skills. Small surface — 136 lines, one tool.

tasks.title: hex_validate — post-build validation MCP tool
tasks.description: Post-build semantic validation judge. Currently invoked via hex_exec; deserves a first-class tool.

tasks.title: hex_opencode — opencode integration MCP tools
tasks.description: OpenCode sidebar integration status and config. Lower priority — only needed when running inside OpenCode.

phases.gate: cargo check -p hex-cli && cargo test -p hex-cli

phases.title: Validation — Full Parity Audit
phases.description: Automated verification that every CLI domain now has MCP coverage.

tasks.title: Parity test — assert CLI domains == MCP tool domains
tasks.description: Integration test that enumerates CLI subcommands and asserts each has at least one MCP tool. Prevents future drift.

tasks.title: Update ADR-2603222229 to Accepted
tasks.description: Flip status to Accepted once parity test passes. Optionally accept ADR-2604021215 (STDB direct query) since T0.3 implements it.

excluded.assets: Internal command (extracts embedded assets to disk). No agent use case.
excluded.hook_execution: Hooks run automatically via Claude Code lifecycle. Exposing execution as MCP tool is a security risk — agents should not trigger arbitrary hooks.
excluded.mcp_command: The 'hex mcp' command IS the MCP server. Self-referential tool makes no sense.

estimated_complexity.P0: medium — wraps existing nexus client calls
estimated_complexity.P1: medium — structured output already exists in CLI
